title: coix lacryma-jobi
intro: Coix lacryma-jobi, also known as Job's Tears, is an annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve kidney function. The health benefits of Coix lacryma-jobi include reducing blood pressure, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune system function. Coix lacryma-jobi can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
